query:
INSERT INTO site_banners (title, message, type, linkUrl, linkText, isActive, startDate, endDate, createdAt)
VALUES (
  'SUMMER SALE',
  'Up to 40% off selected styles. Limited stock, one-of-a-kind pieces.',
  'promo',
  '/shop',
  'Shop the Sale',
  true,
  NOW(),
  DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY),
  NOW()
);
